model_specification_line: results = smf.wls("full_time ~ treatment + female + age + C(year)", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit()
sample_selection: citizen in {3, 4, 5} (noncitizens or first papers pending) to reflect undocumented statuses
year of immigration between 1 and the survey year and arrival_age >= 0 (yrimmig - birthyr)
age > 0 and birthyr >= 1900 to avoid implausible values
person weight perwt > 0 and usual hours reported (uhrswork >= 1)
